steps.title: Set up the total earnings inequality
steps.content:
Total earnings = base salary $$x$$ + commission $$0.11s$$.
The goal requires total earnings be at least $$3x$$ and at most $$4x$$:
$$3x \le x + 0.11s \le 4x$$

steps.title: Isolate s
steps.content:
Subtract $$x$$ from all parts:
$$2x \le 0.11s \le 3x$$
Divide by $$0.11$$:
$$\frac{2}{0.11}x \le s \le \frac{3}{0.11}x$$

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '$2x\le s\le3x$': This would mean dividing by 1, not 0.11 — ignores the commission rate. ✗
  • Choice B — '$\frac{2}{0.11}x\le s\le\frac{3}{0.11}x$': Matches exactly. ✓
  • Choice C — '$3x\le s\le4x$': Uses the original multipliers 3 and 4, not the reduced values 2 and 3 after subtracting x. ✗
  • Choice D — '$\frac{3}{0.11}x\le s\le\frac{4}{0.11}x$': Uses 3 and 4 as numerators instead of 2 and 3 — does not subtract x first. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
